scripts.start:dev: cd ../.. && npm run build:common && NODE_ENV=development APP=shop nest start shop --watch
scripts.docker:build:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.docker:start:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml up
scripts.docker:db:generate:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml exec -w /app/apps/shop shop npm run db:generate --
scripts.docker:migrate:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml run --rm migrate; STATUS=$?; docker rmi rd_shop_dev_migrate_tmp 2>/dev/null; exit $STATUS
scripts.docker:migrate:dev:rebuild: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml run --rm --build migrate; STATUS=$?; docker rmi rd_shop_dev_migrate_tmp 2>/dev/null; exit $STATUS
scripts.docker:seed:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml run --rm seed; STATUS=$?; docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml rm -f migrate 2>/dev/null; docker rmi rd_shop_dev_seed_tmp rd_shop_dev_migrate_tmp 2>/dev/null; exit $STATUS
scripts.docker:seed:dev:rebuild: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml run --rm --build seed; STATUS=$?; docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml rm -f migrate 2>/dev/null; docker rmi rd_shop_dev_seed_tmp rd_shop_dev_migrate_tmp 2>/dev/null; exit $STATUS
scripts.docker:down:dev: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_dev -f compose.yml -f compose.dev.yml down
scripts.docker:start:prod:debug: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_prod -f compose.yml --profile debug up app-debug
scripts.docker:migrate:prod: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_prod -f compose.yml run --rm migrate
scripts.docker:seed:prod: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_prod -f compose.yml run --rm seed
scripts.docker:down:prod:debug: docker compose -p rd_shop_backend_shop_prod -f compose.yml --profile debug down
scripts.e2e:fresh: npm run e2e:up && npm run e2e:migrate && npm run e2e:seed && npm run e2e:app || npm run e2e:down
scripts.e2e:up: docker compose -p rd_shop_e2e -f compose.e2e.yml up -d postgres-shop-e2e postgres-payments-e2e rabbitmq-e2e minio-e2e && docker compose -p rd_shop_e2e -f compose.e2e.yml --profile init run --rm minio-init-e2e
scripts.e2e:app: docker compose -p rd_shop_e2e -f compose.e2e.yml --profile app up
scripts.e2e:down: docker compose -p rd_shop_e2e -f compose.e2e.yml --profile app down -v --remove-orphans --rmi local
scripts.perf:fresh: npm run perf:up && npm run perf:migrate && npm run perf:seed && npm run perf:app
scripts.perf:fresh:unconstrained: npm run perf:up && npm run perf:migrate && npm run perf:seed && npm run perf:app:unconstrained
scripts.perf:fresh:grpc-breaker: npm run perf:up && npm run perf:migrate && npm run perf:seed && npm run perf:app:grpc-breaker:rebuild
scripts.perf:up: docker compose -p rd_shop_perf -f compose.perf.yml up -d postgres-perf rabbitmq-perf
scripts.perf:app: docker compose --compatibility -p rd_shop_perf -f compose.perf.yml --profile app up shop-perf
scripts.perf:app:rebuild: docker compose --compatibility -p rd_shop_perf -f compose.perf.yml --profile app up --build shop-perf
scripts.perf:app:unconstrained: docker compose -p rd_shop_perf -f compose.perf.yml --profile app-unconstrained up shop-perf-unconstrained
scripts.perf:app:unconstrained:rebuild: docker compose -p rd_shop_perf -f compose.perf.yml --profile app-unconstrained up --build shop-perf-unconstrained
